ValidationRule.description: Package Code is mandatory at "In Service" stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Client Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Solvency") ), ISPICKVAL(Status, "In Service"), Package_Code__c ="" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Package Code is missing on this request. Please add one before put it to "in Service" Status.
